name: Advanced Think Tank AI Profile Generation

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 512, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.userId, profile_summary: $json.profile, preference_overrides: [], last_generated_at: new Date().toISOString(), version: 1 }) }}

meta.description: Generates AI user profiles from preferences + interactions using Claude. Called after onboarding and every 5th interaction.
